Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search for emails related to Canopy Health, Patricia Langford, Dr. Renata Kovacs, Marcus Webb, Tyler Okonkwo, and Dr. Anand Mehta to find the Q2 batch relocation request, coordinator assignments, Catalina's plan summary, surcharge approval status, and the Mehta CMO relocation thread sent to Mina.
OE 2: Search for emails related to PivotPoint Labs, Sam Delgado, Nadia Okonjo, and Diego Castañeda to find the original relocation request details, visa coordination with Lorraine Pham, and Catalina's internal updates.
OE 3: Search Slack for Canopy and PivotPoint discussions to find internal context on coordinator assignments, move statuses, surcharge approval flags, capacity concerns, and any flagged issues across #customer-engagement and #operations.
OE 4: Search CRM for Canopy Health company record and related deals to find the active Q2 deals Dr. Kovacs Nashville-Toronto ($3,850, inprogress), Marcus Webb Detroit-Chicago ($3,200, inprogress), Tyler Okonkwo Philadelphia-Denver ($2,160, inprogress) and discover the Dr. Anand Mehta CMO executive relocation ($12,170, inprogress, AM: Mina Hashimoto).
OE 5: Search CRM for PivotPoint Labs company record and related deals to find deal_pivot_april_2026_dual ($10,650, inprogress Nadia Okonjo and Diego Castañeda) and deal_pivot_q2 ($5,803, closedwon Ines Kovac completed).
OE 6: Search Airtable relocation records for Canopy Health to find all active moves: Dr. Renata Kovacs (Nashville-Toronto, In Progress, coordinator: Fatimah Al-Rashidi, international cross-border with TN visa/customs, employer letter deadline April 7), Marcus Webb (Detroit-Chicago, In Progress, coordinator: Blessing Okafor, split-vendor with cold-chain cryogenic lab equipment at -20°C to lab dock), Tyler Okonkwo (Philadelphia-Denver, In Progress, coordinator: Javier Morales, 13-day temp storage gap, Denver lease starts May 1), Rachel Dominguez (LA-Portland, In Progress), Kevin Okafor (Phoenix-Portland, In Progress).
OE 7: Search Airtable relocation records for PivotPoint Labs to find Nadia Okonjo (SF-Austin, In Progress, coordinator: Fatimah Al-Rashidi, H-1B visa holder requiring USCIS address-change filing within 10 days, immigration attorney Lorraine Pham) and Diego Castañeda (Brooklyn-Austin, In Progress, coordinator: Javier Morales, CNC mill ~600 lbs/$42K, 16-day storage gap, delivery after May 1).
OE 8: Search Linear for existing Canopy-related tickets to check which Q2 wave items already have tracking and which are unresolved without a ticket. Identify items that need new tickets.
OE 9: Search Linear for PivotPoint-related tickets to find existing relocation tracking issues and their current statuses.
OE 10: Search QuickBooks for Canopy invoices to find the Q2 wave invoice (INV-2026-0401, $9,210) and verify whether the $2,650 in surcharges (Kovacs $850 customs broker, Webb $1,200 cold-chain freight, Okonkwo $600 temp storage) are still pending Patricia's written approval.
OE 11: Look up Patricia Langford's contact details to confirm patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io before sending the check-in email.
OE 12: Send an email (via send_email) from catalina.dubois@moveops.com to patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io with a check-in covering the status of each active Canopy move and including the $2,650 surcharge approval request for the three Q2 relocations.
OE 13: Create Linear tickets (via linear_create_issue) for any unresolved Canopy items that lack existing tracking e.g., Tyler Okonkwo's approaching May 1 delivery deadline, surcharge approval gap, or any move with outstanding coordinator follow-ups.
OE 14: Update CRM engagement notes (via crm_create_engagement) for Canopy Health with Q2 wave status findings, the Mehta CMO relocation discovery, surcharge approval status, and any tickets created.
OE 15: Update CRM engagement notes (via crm_create_engagement) for PivotPoint Labs with Nadia and Diego relocation statuses, H-1B compliance findings, and expansion opportunity context.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
